data.title: 国际服专辑「A Night at Millennium」发行
data.summary: [‘A Night at Millennium’ Digital Album Released!] Sensei, a new digital album featuring rearranged B
data.body:
[‘A Night at Millennium’ Digital Album Released!]

Sensei, a new digital album featuring rearranged Blue Archive OSTs, A Night at Millennium, is now available~ 🎵

Enjoy beautifully reimagined tracks by various artists, and don’t miss the playlist video capturing the charming moments of Yuuka, Koyuki, and Noa spending a night at Millennium!

➡️ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2946013

#BlueArchive
